Tests object creation with a constructor function in strict mode.

# Purpose
This code defines a function [`f`](<#pebble-firmware/src/fw/vendor/jerryscript/tests/jerry/regression-test-issue-689f>) that takes a single parameter `g`. The function creates a new instance of `g` by passing an object with a property `prop_name` set to the string `'value'`. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing on the instantiation of objects with a specific property configuration. It is a short script that demonstrates object creation using a constructor function or class passed as an argument.

### f<!-- {{#callable:pebble-firmware/src/fw/vendor/jerryscript/tests/jerry/regression-test-issue-689.f}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../../../src/fw/vendor/jerryscript/tests/jerry/regression-test-issue-689.js#L18>)

Creates a new instance of the class or function `g` with a specific property.
- **Inputs**:
    - `g`: A class or function that can be instantiated with an object containing properties.
- **Control Flow**:
    - Instantiates `g` with an object that has a property `prop_name` set to 'value'.
- **Output**: No return value.
